text:
The Glam Clan (, Guramu Ichizoku) is a former tribe of migrants that settled in the location now known as Glam Gas Land. Hunter × Hunter: Hisoka's Past (One-Shot) 

Overview

Originally known as the Glam Caravan, the Glam Clan made a lucrative fortune selling the area's natural gas. Once the gas was depleted, the clan made their fortune with high-end hotels, casinos, and entertainment businesses. 

Plot

Hisoka's Past spin-off

On the Yorbian Continent, a tribe of migrants known as the Glam Caravan discovered a valuable natural gas resource in the red earth mountains and settled near the deposits, abandoning its centuries-old nomadic lifestyle. The land became known as Glam Gas Land, and many came in search of the valuable gas. After the deposits were depleted and the Glam Clan became wealthy from their management of the resource, they focused on the business of casino management. Hotels were built alongside the casinos and competed with each other to bring in the most guests, attracting the best magicians and performers for their shows. Consequently, show business became the city's signature trade.
